_howto: COPY this file to a new name like my-new-project.json (the filename becomes the URL slug: /projects/my-new-project/). Fill in the fields, add images to public/images/projects/my-new-project/, set published to true, commit, and push. The site rebuilds and deploys automatically. Fields marked optional can be null or [].
title: Project Title
summary: One or two sentences shown on the project card and at the top of the case study.
problem: What was broken, slow, manual, or untrustworthy before this project existed?
solution: What you built and how it works, at a level a hiring manager can follow.
impact: The business outcome: numbers, time saved, cost reduced, decisions enabled.

architecture.description: How data flows through the system, component by component.

challenges: A hard problem you hit and how you handled it. (optional — remove section by using [])
designDecisions: A choice you made, the alternative you rejected, and why. (optional)
lessonsLearned: Something you'd carry into the next project. (optional)
